urls.title: The Ultimate Shopify AI Automation Bundle (n8n JSON + Setup Guide)
urls.description: 🚀 The Ultimate Shopify to Discord/Slack AI Automation BundleStop checking your Shopify dashboard every 5 minutes. Let AI handle your order intelligence while you focus on scaling.Managing a growing Shopify store is tough. Raw order data is messy, and important high-value orders often get buried in notification noise. Ether AI Studio brings you a production-ready automation engine that doesn't just notify you—it thinks for you.🧠 Why this is a Game-Changer:Most notifications just say "New Order #1001." Our system uses OpenAI GPT-4o-mini to analyze the order and send a human-readable summary directly to your team's communication hub. Instant Insights: Know exactly what was bought and who bought it without opening a single app. Zero Latency: Built on n8n, the world’s most flexible automation platform. Dual-Channel Ready: Notify your warehouse team on Slack and your marketing team on Discord simultaneously. 📦 What’s Inside the Bundle? The Master JSON Workflow: A pre-configured n8n file.

I'll audit ONE workflow for free today.

Tell me your most painful manual process and I'll sketch out exactly how to automate it with AI + n8n.

No pitch. No strings. Just a real workflow diagram you can implement yourself.

Drop it below.

Stop hiring VAs for tasks AI can do in seconds.

Real example:

Client paying $15/hr for email sorting.
We built an n8n workflow:
- Classifies by urgency
- Routes to right person
- Drafts replies

Cost: $4.50/mo
Time to build: 2 days
ROI: infinite

Those AI tools didn't fail — they were made obsolete by the models themselves.
                                                                                                                                        Poe died when one model was enough. n8n died when models could

Just wait 6 months, your computer will be able to do all the work you do. Maximum 1 year.

MSMEs don't need complex AI solution, just basic tools can also save a lot of time.

urls.description: Claude Cowork is not the same as Claude Chat. It is more powerful, it can automate the work, and connect with your existing platforms. ➡️ If you are wondering how, this free 30-minute event is for you. Claude Cowork lets you hand off real work to AI and get finished files back. You describe what you need in plain language, and it runs the task from start to finish, no coding, no prompting tricks, no IT team required. Literally go from idea to execution. Here's what that looks like: ✔️ Wake up to a pipeline review already written, with follow-up emails drafted for every open deal. ✔️ Redesign your entire website and get it built in less than 4 hours. ✔️ Drop in a vendor contract and get back a plain-language summary of everything you'd want your lawyer to flag. ✔️ Your team meeting prep—context, agenda, key questions—takes three minutes instead of thirty. These aren't demos. These are things we're doing inside Biggest Goal right now. Join Biggest Goal Co-Founders Alane Boyd and Micah Jo

data.text:
Theory says one thing.
Production says another.

The gap is wild.

We ran the real benchmarks, hit the real failures, and documented what no one else seems to be writing about.

This one's for the builders.

n8n Workflow Automation: Build AI-Powered Decision Engines

n8n connects

Built an n8n workflow yesterday that saves a marketing team 15 hours/week.

What it does:
- Monitors 4 social channels
- Auto-categorizes mentions (positive/negative/question)
- Routes to the right team member
- Drafts responses using AI

Total cost: $0/month on self-hosted n8n.
